---
name: Idea / Proposal
about: You have an idea for a solution, improvement, or a different approach
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: idea
---

**What does this relate to?**
If it connects to one of the [open problems](../../README.md#open-problems) or [status.md](../../docs/status.md), feel free to mention it — but a completely new idea or direction is just as welcome.

**Your idea**
What are you thinking?

**Have you tried it?**
If yes: how did it go? If not: that's totally fine too, this can just be a starting point for discussion.

**Anything else**
Sketches, photos, links to inspiration — anything that helps others picture it.
